title: Saladin

actors: Ahmad Mazhar, Salah Zulfikar, Nadia Lutfi
plot: After Saladin's victory over the King of Jerusalem, a peace treaty is signed between them, but the commander of the Crusader army, Renaud de Chatillon, slaughters a group of pilgrims going to Mecca. Saladin then decides to take re...
